summary: Menu bar health score with system status popover, top CPU/memory processes, and optional hide from Dock.
introduced: Health score menu bar icon with color-coded 0–100 score based on CPU, memory, and disk pressure
System Status popover shows macOS version, CPU and memory usage, load average, disk free space, uptime, machine model, and top CPU/memory processes
Settings toggle to hide DiskWise from the Dock while keeping menu bar access
changed: Menu bar popovers include toggles for percentage, free GB, and health score displays
Health metrics refresh automatically every 10–30 seconds depending on system pressure
